#Hydrophone calibration sensitivities. This file contains one header line followed by comma delimited data. First column is the centre frequency of each bin (Hz). Second column is the sensitivity calibration for each bin (dB re Counts^2/uPa^2). Data is from device attributes: https://data.oceannetworks.ca/DeviceListing?DeviceId=74140. Applicable for deviceID 74140 from 08-Feb-2024 19:13:00 (ongoing). Device attribute HydrophoneSensitivityVectorPart1 last modified: 19-Sep-2024 09:04:10, comment (first-part only): Calibration provided by John Dorocicz for ICLISTENHF6324, covering 10-4440Hz
